User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Do not index auth flows — no value for search users
Disallow: /login
Disallow: /signup
Disallow: /forgot-password
Disallow: /resources/product-comparison

# Common search engines
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 1

User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 2

User-agent: Slurp
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 3

# Block known bad scrapers
User-agent: SemrushBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: AhrefsBot
Disallow: /

Sitemap: https://smartpicksdaily.com/sitemap.xml
